name: EPG Enricharr
description: Enrich EPG data for Plex DVR recognition
author: epg-enricharr-team

fields.label: Enable plugin
fields.description: Enable or disable the entire plugin

fields.label: Enable TV enrichment
fields.description: Parse episode strings (S2E36) and add season/episode metadata

fields.label: Enable sports enrichment (V2)
fields.description: Year-based season numbering for sports (coming in V2)

fields.label: Auto-mark previously shown
fields.description: Mark programmes as previously_shown if not explicitly new

fields.label: Dry run mode
fields.description: Log changes without writing to database
